scripts.vercel-build: cd server && npm install && npx prisma generate && npm run build && cd ../client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:init
scripts.start: npm run setup && npm run dev
scripts.install:all: npm i && cd client && npm i && cd ../server && npm i
scripts.db:init: cd server && ([ ! -f .env ] && echo 'DATABASE_URL="file:./dev.db"' > .env || true) && npx prisma db push && npx prisma db seed
